title: Gordon Parks: The South in Color
location: Jackson Fine Art, 3165 Peachtree Hills Ave NE, Atlanta
description: Over 40 powerful photographs from Gordon Parks' iconic 1956 Life magazine series on Jim Crow South. A striking, moving exhibit perfect for couples who appreciate art with history and soul.

title: Atlanta Veg Week Kickoff Party
location: Patagonia Atlanta, 65 N Avondale Rd, Atlanta
description: Kick off Atlanta Veg Week! Meet plant-based chefs, sample vegan bites, and explore the city's week-long celebration of climate-friendly eating. A unique, low-pressure date night exploring new flavors together.

title: Jonathan Butler Live at City Winery
location: City Winery Atlanta, 45 13th St NE, Atlanta
description: South African jazz-soul guitarist Jonathan Butler performs live. City Winery's intimate setting makes this perfect for a romantic date — great wine, incredible music, and no rush to leave.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 87到位10th St NW, Atlanta
description: Atlanta's top comedians in one room. Laughing Skull is intimate, has great drinks, and the comics bring serious heat. A perfect laugh-out-loud date night.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 1
description: Atlanta's iconic spring music festival returns for its 21st year with multiple stages, major touring acts, craft beer, and stunning park vibes. The ultimate outdoor festival date.

title: Can't Even Comedy Show
location: Epicurean Atlanta Hotel, 1117 Ne Brian M.interchange, Atlanta
description: A fresh, well-curated stand-up show at the stylish Epicurean Hotel. Great vibes, solid drinks, and hilarious local comics. Feels like a secret your cool friend told you about.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 2
description: Day 2 of the city's biggest spring festival. More music, more food vendors, more reason to grab your partner and make a full day of it outdoors.

title: Squids N Giggles Comedy at Argosy
description: Weekly comedy showcase at one of Atlanta's best bars. Quirky crowd, great energy, and you can make it a full night — drinks, trivia, and laughs all in one spot.

title: Pours & Punchlines Comedy Showcase
location: Pour Taproom-Beltline, 753 Edgewood Ave NE, Atlanta
description: Stand-up comedy right on the Atlanta Beltline! Great craft beer selection and a fun, casual vibe. Grab a pour, find a seat, and enjoy a night that beats any Netflix queue.

title: Bachata x Zouk ATL Weekender - Opening Night
description: Three-day Bachata and Zouk dance festival with workshops, social dancing, and live performances. Perfect for couples wanting to learn new moves together or show off on the dance floor.

title: Date Night Painting - Summer Moon River
location: Painting with a Twist, 180 Cobb Pkwy NW, Kennesaw
description: Couples-friendly painting class creating a beautiful Summer Moon River canvas together. BYOB allowed and you take home your creation as a keepsake from your date. No experience needed.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends - Atlanta
location: BLOCK & DRUM, 3566 Chamblee Tuckeston Rd, Chamblee
description: Atlanta's hottest Amapiano and Afrobeats party! Top DJs spinning African rhythms and South African house all night. Great vibes, dancing, and an incredible crowd. Don't sleep on this one.
